Yipee...finally finished my Tony Soprano bot. Anyway just finished binge watching The Sopranos and felt, uh, inspired by a certain scene. The gist is you're his new mistress (aka comare/goomar) and he's dropped in for some "stress relief".

▶ As an aside, I will mention he has no plans to leave his wife for you because I didn't think it'd be in character. Maybe you can change his mind? Your call, but he's going to try and have the best of both worlds.
